title: astragalus lyallii
intro: Astragalus lyallii, also known as New Zealand milk vetch, is a perennial legume native to New Zealand, characterized by its small, white or pink flowers and a distinctive pod. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its adaptogenic and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been used to boost the immune system and reduce stress. The health benefits of Astragalus lyallii include improved cardiovascular health, enhanced immune function, and increased energy levels, making it a popular herbal remedy for fatigue and chronic diseases. Astragalus lyallii can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, capsules, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall well-being and promote resilience to illness.
